author: Honkai: Star Rail
text:
Improv Tour Trailer: "Death of the Elation" | Honkai: Star Rail
"The end of the world, I am still enroute."
"I have clearly seen the end of the Elation."
"For whom the bell tolls? I say, use this silent funeral to mourn THEIR death, and my destruction."

English Voice:
Asat Pramad — Joe Hernandez
Ryusuke — Frank Todaro
Himeko — Caitlyn Elizabeth
